description: Position-effect / expression held-out track for the Genome-Writing Challenge. Sealed before model selection.
label: measured TRIP integrated-reporter expression (log2) + silenced flag (NON-circular: the measured label, not a submitter claim)

chrom_holdout.rationale: ~20% of TRIP integrations held out by whole chromosome (leakage control: nearby integrations share chromatin). Frozen + SHA-locked before model selection.

celltype_holdout.rationale: leave-one-cell-type-out (the headline transfer track) needs >=2 cell types; activates on PatchMPRA/MPIRE/lentiMPRA/Leemans acquisition. No transfer number is fabricated until then.
